text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky asks me to accompany her to her
dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, Trainer! Hehe, I'm really
happy you're here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming, Trainer! Hehe, I'm really
happy you're here! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll show you that running isn't my only weapon!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll show you that running isn't my only weapon!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get jiggy to the max! ♪ Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to get jiggy to the max! ♪ Just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three, four! Yeah, yeah! ♪ Woo,
woo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know, right? I'm in the groove!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But I have to admit... I think the dance is still
missing a certain something.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You know, that thing. What's it called? The folding fan with fluffy feathers on it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If I had one of those, that would be super hype
for my dances!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If I had one of those, that would be super hype
for my dances!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's apparently all the rage in the city, but I
guess you never came across it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's apparently all the rage in the city, but I
guess you never came across it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's try something a little different
with today's lesson...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to teach you the latest dance moves! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm going to teach you the latest dance moves! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're always the one teaching me things,
right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're always the one teaching me things,
right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: So today, it's my turn to teach you. Hehe, this is going to be great! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's continue the dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to pick up the pace. Don't blink, or
you'll miss it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Maruzensky shows me a number of her
liveliest dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! ♪ Pump it up! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's moves somehow remind me of
school dances when I was younger, but she looks
so happy...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Takes you back? Wh-what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Young people these days are getting jiggy like
this, aren't they?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's what my mom told me. She said this is the
big thing in the city...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I saw a movie that had a scene where
everyone was doing this dance together!
choice_data_list: Maybe that movie was old to begin with...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
What?! That can't be true! It was a very popular
VHS!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: If that isn't trendy, then what in the world is?
choice_data_list:
Maybe try watching the latest shows on your
smartphone?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You can do that with a phone?! I had no idea...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heh... To be honest, I'm not very good at using
mine yet...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But just you wait and see! I'll figure out that
gadget one of these days!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: For the trends!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road is still long, but Maruzensky's
determination remains firm...
